boundary: This is a bounded reduced four-state candidate search. Exact candidates are hypotheses, not full native derivations. This does not derive the full role-labeled shared_B universe and does not close Gap A.
interpretation: Artifact 042 showed that scalar targets are not raw station-row aggregate readouts. This bounded audit searches coupled residue readouts using complements, C-path exclusions, role-class gates, role-pair gates, station-role gates, and q gates.
